_meta.purpose: TTS-facing Chinese heteronym ('破音字') danger list. Scan narration before sending to ElevenLabs — flag these chars and rewrite to safe alternatives.
_meta.source: observed from 2026-04-22 (還→hái mispronounced as hái for 還給) and 2026-04-23 (還是→hái mispronounced as huán-shì) — ElevenLabs multilingual_v2 makes context-blind defaults for Chinese heteronyms
_meta.confidence_note: Entries marked 'confirmed' are observed in actual TTS output. Entries marked 'suspected' are theoretical from the character being known-破音字 — verify before relying on rewrite.

observed_failures: 還給 — ElevenLabs read as hái-gěi (wrong, should be huán-gěi) — 2026-04-22 demo
還是 — ElevenLabs read as huán-shì (wrong, should be hái-shì) — 2026-04-23 v2
還.rule: AVOID in narration entirely. ElevenLabs is unreliable in both directions.

rewrites.還錢: 還錢（須測試）/ 把錢退回

行.rule: 前後文足以消歧通常 OK，但含「行業」「銀行」時特別留意

得.rule: 「必須」語意用「dei」通常正確，但助詞 de 可能被誤讀

為.rule: 一般 context 足以消歧；仍需抽查

的.rule: 助詞 de 預設正確；「的確/目的」要檢查

著.rule: 助詞 zhe 預設正確；其他用法抽查

覺.rule: 低風險，一般 context 足夠

差.rule: 三讀音容易混；含「出差」時抽查

usage.preflight_check: In tts_with_asr.js, before calling TTS, run narration.join('\n') through a char scan. For each char in this map, flag the occurrence with its context. Humans/Claude reviews and rewrites as needed.
usage.rewrite_pass: Optional auto-substitute: scan for exact word keys in rewrites (e.g. 還是→仍然) and swap. Must only run if Claude explicitly approves the rewrite for the given narrative (some rewrites change tone).
usage.post_hoc_probe: After TTS, run Whisper back-transcription. For each heteronym occurrence, check that the char appears at the expected position. If Whisper returns a different char (e.g. 換 instead of 還), it's likely a mispronunciation — retry or rewrite.
